meta.title: Top 200 Computer Science, AI/ML, and Data Science Universities
meta.source_note: Curated from the Times Higher Education Computer Science World University Rankings 2026 top 200, then enriched with ROR institutional metadata and official research links for spotlight universities.
methodology: Primary ranked list: THE Computer Science World University Rankings 2026 top 200.
Metadata enrichment: Research Organization Registry (ROR) for official websites, location, and founding year when available.
Spotlight pages: hand-curated official department/lab links and notable research references for especially influential universities.
Use this project as a practical research directory, not as an official institutional ranking publication.
